## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that Nuncio doesn't let you today? What's painful about the current workflow? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like Nuncio to do. A screenshot, sketch, or example command/API call helps a lot. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any other ways you thought about solving this, and why they fall short. -->

## Scope

- Is this a **new agent provider** (e.g. OpenAI/Claude agents SDK), a **UI/UX change**, a **backend feature**, or **infra/deploy**?
- Does it fit an existing roadmap phase? Check [plans/260626-nuncio-roadmap/](../../plans/260626-nuncio-roadmap/) and the roadmap in [README.md](../../README.md#roadmap).

## Will you work on this?

- [ ] Yes — I'd like to open a PR (TDD-first, with a changeset)
- [ ] Maybe — happy to pair / review
- [ ] No — just suggesting
